# cirro_user (Data Source)

Fetches details of a Cirro user by username.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) Cirro username.

### Read-Only

- `department` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `global_roles` (List of String)
- `job_title` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `phone` (String)
